name: stockyard-tracelink
description: Link related LLM calls into trace trees. Correlate multi-step agent workflows. OpenTelemetry-compatible trace propagation with waterfall visualization.

tools.name: tracelink_traces
tools.description: List recent traces with root span info, total duration, and span count.

tools.name: tracelink_get
tools.description: Get full trace tree with all spans for a trace ID.

tools.name: tracelink_stats
tools.description: Get tracing statistics: total traces, avg spans per trace, avg duration.

tools.name: tracelink_search
tools.description: Search traces by model, duration, or span count.

tools.name: tracelink_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the TraceLink proxy is running and healthy.
